issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response:
I understand you've lost access to your Claude team workspace and need it restored urgently.

This type of request, involving the restoration of workspace access after an admin removal, requires specific actions that can only be performed by your organization's administrators or a specialized team with the necessary permissions.

In the meantime, the quickest way to regain access is often by reaching out to an IT admin or owner within your organization. They have the ability to reinstate your seat directly.

We've escalated your ticket to our specialized team who will review your situation and follow up with you as soon as possible. Your issue is important to us and will be prioritized.

issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response:
I understand your concern regarding your recent HackerRank test score and your request for a review of your answers and reconsideration for the next round. It's completely understandable to want clarity on your performance.

This particular request requires the attention of a specialized team who can best address your situation.

While they review your case, please be aware that HackerRank does not participate in the hiring decisions of companies, nor are we authorized to modify test results or influence the hiring process. For any specific feedback on your test performance, a review of your answers, or inquiries about your application's status, the most effective step is to directly contact the recruiter or hiring team at the company you applied to. They are the primary point of contact for all hiring-related matters.

Your issue has been escalated, and the specialized team will prioritize its review and get back to you with further information as soon as they can.
justification: Escalated with confidence=High. Reason: Ticket matches a category that requires a specialized team.
